meanings.definition: the act of gripping and pressing firmly
examples: he gave her cheek a playful squeeze

meanings.definition: to compress with violence, out of natural shape or condition
squeeze like a wedge into a tight space
examples: I squeezed myself into the corner

meanings.definition: to cause to do through pressure or necessity, by physical, moral or intellectual means :
examples: She forced him to take a job in the city
They extorted money from the executive by threatening to reveal his past to the company boss
They squeezed money from the owner of the business by threatening him
She thrust the letter into his hand

meanings.definition: squeeze (someone) tightly in your arms, usually with fondness
examples: He hugged her close to him
